description: Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of sandals from marvel. Featuring Spider-Man on its upper, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park.Product DetailsRed sandals with Spider-Man design on upperRed ankle straps with brandingOne piece foamy rubber upper and outsoleGrooved outsole with brandingMaterial and CareRubberWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
